TextView.android:text: Evolved Node B for LTE Hacking and 5G Downgrade
Interactive sip toolkit for packet manipulations
For developers and administrators of SIP
Perform attacks to general voip services
Fuck SIP protocol like a motherfucker
Perform SIP/SDP INVITE flooding over UDP/IP
Flood any device that is processing RTP
Detects, reconstructs, and analyzes RTP sessions
Insert audio into a specified audio RTP stream
